Descriptions.Description: Fork Compression Valve Tool - Removal
For removing the compression valve from cartridge
19 mm hex drive, 36 mm octagon
Fuel Line Quick-Disconnect Coupling - 1/4"
Straight through; no shut off
Capable of withstanding temperatures of -40° F to 180° F
Viton® type fluoroelastomer O-rings provide superior chemical resistance
Made in the USA
Not for use with fuel injected engines.
Throttle Sleeve - Replacement
Replace OEM throttle sleeves
Heavier duty and exceed the quality and durability of OEM sleeves
Will not scar bars like aluminum sleeves
Nylon fabric composite material
Molded ridges to help secure grips
One-piece tube and reel design

Vortex™ SE Throttle Kit - TRX450
Replaces chunky thumb throttle with smooth, easy-to-use twist throttle
Includes super tough Motion Pro Titan Throttle Tube™
POM pulley with brass bearing for smooth feel and extended wear resistance
Smooth painted black finish
Light, ultra-compact design maximizes handlebar space
Die cast aluminum construction with billet aluminum cover
Compatible with Motion Pro DirtControl™ V2 and ODI V2 Lock-On grips using cam "C"
Fast twist rate opens throttle at 0.526 mm of cable pull per degree of rotation
Will pull 50 mm at maximum twist of 95°

Rev3 Variable Rate Throttle Kit - CRF
Slim REV3™ throttle housing allows more room for lever clearance and adjustment to throttle housing position
Innovative reel changing system lets you tailor the throttle rate to your preference and riding conditions

Five different reels provide perfect throttle response for any condition: Use smaller reels for slower throttle rate and larger reels for faster throttle rate; included cam reel provides progressive throttle response preferred by some riders
Cable boot keeps dirt and dust out for reliable and smooth operation
Improved throttle stop provides greater strength and durability - Snap together elbows makes it even easier to install and change reels
REV3™ off-road kits are compatible with Motion Pro DirtControl™ V2 Lock-On grips and ODI Lock-On grips
Billet aluminum inline cable adjusters ease installation and adjustment
Simple to install and maintain
Upper section of cables use 6 mm housing to provide solid support of adjusters
Lower section of cables use 5 mm housing with PTFE liner for reduced friction, increased routing flexibility and lighter weight
Patented

Rev3 Kits have cables specifically designed for fitment on specific models, but the Rev3 throttle itself is not model specific. Therefore, in some situations, the Rev3 kit may not be a direct bolt on installation due to space limitations on the stock handlebar. In some installations, it may be necessary to move other control components on the stock handlebar, shorten the Rev3 throttle tube and grip, install longer after market handlebars, or possibly all of the above. It is up to the end user to determine the best method for fitment on their motorcycle, and ensure that the Rev3 kit is installed properly and with the correct clearances for safe operation. Installation should be done by a qualified mechanic and carefully checked for proper function. Warning: Improper installation could result in great bodily injury or death.

DirtControl™ V2 Grips - Gray
V2 lock-on system provides slip-free performance
Easy installation and removal that doesn’t require glue – No more waiting for glue to dry!
Throttle tube features a unique snap on cam system that allows one throttle tube to work with many models and brands
Medium density compound grip
Motion Pro web pattern and fingertip traction with light knurling

Secure feel in both wet and dry conditions

Optional cams included: A, B, C, D, J & M
Additional cam reels are available
Unique grip pattern designed by Motion Pro
Made for Motion Pro in USA by ODI

Motion Pro CR Pro™ SE Throttle
Die-cast aluminum housing
Smooth painted black finish
Stainless steel hardware
Fits 7/8" (22 mm) bars
Straight-pull assembly
Recommended for 34 mm or smaller single-pull carburetors
Includes nylon throttle tube with grip retaining ring
Drum brake Honda CR replacement (pre-'84)
Maximum twist 170° / maximum travel 58 mm
Motion Pro Turbo™ SE Throttle
Die cast aluminum construction with billet aluminum cover
POM pulley with brass bearing for smooth feel and extended wear resistance
Smooth painted black finish
Perfect twist ratio for off road motorcycles and ATVs
Fits 7/8” (22 mm) bars
Opens 20 - 38 mm carburetors
Comes complete with cable adjuster and dust boot
Includes nylon throttle tube with pop out end cap
Special application Motion Pro cables available for use on many other bikes
Maximum twist 120° / maximum travel 52 mm
Push-Pull SE Throttle
Die-cast aluminum housing
Smooth painted black finish
Stainless steel hardware
Fits 7/8" (22 mm) bars
Opens carburetors up to 38 mm
Perfect for smooth-bore conversions on street and race bikes
Special cables available to fit most conversions
Includes nylon throttle tube with grip retaining ring and pop out end cap
Maximum twist 165° / maximum travel 45 mm
Titan Throttle Tube™ - Rev2
Designed for the rigorous demands of motocross
Tougher and more resilient for aluminum tubes
Will not deform and seize upon a hard impact like aluminum tubes can
Proprietary low-friction material provides smooth operation and eliminates galling
Cannot be used with bar end mounted handguards

Smooth painted black finish
Light, ultra-compact design maximizes handlebar space
Die cast aluminum construction with billet aluminum cover
Compatible with Motion Pro DirtControl™ V2 and ODI V2 Lock-On grips using cam "C"
Fast twist rate opens throttle at 0.526 mm of cable pull per degree of rotation
Will pull 50 mm at maximum twist of 95°

Replaces chunky thumb throttle with smooth, easy-to-use twist throttle

Rev3 Variable Rate Throttle Kit - CRF250R
Slim REV3™ throttle housing allows more room for lever clearance and adjustment to throttle housing position
Innovative reel changing system lets you tailor the throttle rate to your preference and riding conditions

Five different reels provide perfect throttle response for any condition: Use smaller reels for slower throttle rate and larger reels for faster throttle rate; included cam reel provides progressive throttle response preferred by some riders
Cable boot keeps dirt and dust out for reliable and smooth operation
Improved throttle stop provides greater strength and durability - Snap together elbows makes it even easier to install and change reels
REV3™ off-road kits are compatible with Motion Pro DirtControl™ V2 Lock-On grips and ODI Lock-On grips
Billet aluminum inline cable adjusters ease installation and adjustment
Simple to install and maintain
Upper section of cables use 6 mm housing to provide solid support of adjusters
Lower section of cables use 5 mm housing with PTFE liner for reduced friction, increased routing flexibility and lighter weight
Patented

Rev3 Kits have cables specifically designed for fitment on specific models, but the Rev3 throttle itself is not model specific. Therefore, in some situations, the Rev3 kit may not be a direct bolt on installation due to space limitations on the stock handlebar. In some installations, it may be necessary to move other control components on the stock handlebar, shorten the Rev3 throttle tube and grip, install longer after market handlebars, or possibly all of the above. It is up to the end user to determine the best method for fitment on their motorcycle, and ensure that the Rev3 kit is installed properly and with the correct clearances for safe operation. Installation should be done by a qualified mechanic and carefully checked for proper function. Warning: Improper installation could result in great bodily injury or death.

DirtControl™ V2 Grips - Black
V2 lock-on system provides slip-free performance
Easy installation and removal that doesn’t require glue – No more waiting for glue to dry!

Outlasts conventional grips due to no need for safety wire

Unique grip pattern designed by Motion Pro
Made for Motion Pro in USA by ODI

Clutch Perch - Left - Hot Start - Yamaha
High-quality, durable cast aluminum construction with a polished finish for true OEM fit and look
Motion Pro uses quality aluminum adjusters, not brass
True OEM-style shoulder pivot bolts will not pinch lever when tightened
Locknut with washer holds pivot bolt in place and prevents loosening
Remove hot start lever, including hot start mount plate, from perch when used with applications that do not require a hot start lever.
Low Permeation Fuel Line - Yellow - 1/4" - 3'
Resistant to swelling, hardening and cracking caused by hydrocarbon-based fluids
Fluoropolymer liner compatible with higher ethanol-blend gasoline up to 100%
Highly flexible, easy to install and offers excellent fitting retention
Certified to meet permeation emission standards of 15g/M2/day
Wide temperature range from -20°F to 165°F (-28.9°C to 73.9°C)
Robust multi-layer design and construction

T3 Slidelight™ Clutch Cable - Honda
T3 cables reduce fatigue, provide better clutch feel and dramatically increase cable life
The increased efficiency of Motion Pro's new T3 clutch cables provides a lighter, smoother pull, and significantly increases durability over conventional OEM cables
Motion Pro's tests show that the liner on normal cables can wear out and result in metal-to-metal contact in less than 1,200 cycles, resulting in grinding, friction-generating metal-to-metal contact
The proprietary liner material in T3 cables can last 30,000 cycles with only minimal wear, long after conventional cables have worn out.

T3 Slidelight™ Clutch Cable - Honda
T3 cables reduce fatigue, provide better clutch feel and dramatically increase cable life
The increased efficiency of Motion Pro's new T3 clutch cables provides a lighter, smoother pull, and significantly increases durability over conventional OEM cables
Motion Pro's tests show that the liner on normal cables can wear out and result in metal-to-metal contact in less than 1,200 cycles, resulting in grinding, friction-generating metal-to-metal contact
The proprietary liner material in T3 cables can last 30,000 cycles with only minimal wear, long after conventional cables have worn out.

T3 Slidelight™ Cable - Hot Start - Honda
Cables provides a lighter, smoother pull, and significantly increases durability over conventional OEM cables
Motion Pro's tests show that the liner on normal cables can wear out and result in metal-to-metal contact in less than 1,200 cycles, resulting in grinding, friction-generating metal-to-metal contact

Test results prove that the proprietary liner material in T3 cables can last 30,000 cycles with only minimal wear, giving you a longer-lasting cable that provides consistent smooth performance long after conventional cables have worn out

Screw - Tappet Tool - Oil Filter
O-ring design retains the tool in wrench or socket while flange design allows downward force to be applied to tool
Designed for use with 7/16" combination wrench to allow for maximum rotation without touching engine cases
For use on big twin (excluding twin cam) with slotted screw tappet oil filter screen cover
Can be used without removing exhaust pipes on most bikes
Tappets should be serviced every oil change
Belt Tension Gauge
Designed to work with all belt drive models with a 10 lb specification
Graduated scale for easy reference
New L shaped pad fits all belt sizes
Compact design
Adapter Tool Kit

Adapter kit does not allow two stroke timing kit to be installed on Yamaha RD two stroke twins when the engine is in the frame but does allow adapter kit with two stroke timing kit to work with engine out of frame
Allows water-cooled 2-stroke Timing Kit to be used on air cooled engines with 14 mm spark plugs
Includes extended thread adapter and dial indicator extension

Socket has a very slim OD so it will fit in the tightest of places
Great for shop and home mechanics alike
Includes vinyl storage pouch

Fuel Line Fittings - T-Connector - 1/4" - 10-Pack
Fitting used to run two hoses into one
May be used with O-Clips or hose clamps
Double ear O-clips are easy to install
For use in low-pressure applications
Snag-free, smooth, polished finish
Strong, positive clamping strength without damage to the hose
Simple to remove by clipping an ear
Made in the USA
Not for use with fuel-injected engines
Single Quick-Disconnect Coupling - 1/4"
When connected fuel will flow and when disconnected fuel will not flow
Capable of withstanding temperatures of -40° F to 180° F
These quick-disconnect fittings utilize Viton® type fluoroelastomer O-rings with superior chemical resistance
Made in the USA
Dual Quick-Disconnect Coupling - 5/16"
When connected fuel will flow and when disconnected fuel will not flow

Rev3 Variable Rate Throttle Kit - Honda/Suzuki
Slim REV3™ throttle housing allows more room for lever clearance and adjustment to throttle housing position
Innovative reel changing system lets you tailor the throttle rate to your preference and riding conditions

Five different reels provide perfect throttle response for any condition: Use smaller reels for slower throttle rate and larger reels for faster throttle rate; included cam reel provides progressive throttle response preferred by some riders
Cable boot keeps dirt and dust out for reliable and smooth operation
Improved throttle stop provides greater strength and durability - Snap together elbows makes it even easier to install and change reels
REV3™ off-road kits are compatible with Motion Pro DirtControl™ V2 Lock-On grips and ODI Lock-On grips
Billet aluminum inline cable adjusters ease installation and adjustment
Simple to install and maintain
Upper section of cables use 6 mm housing to provide solid support of adjusters
Lower section of cables use 5 mm housing with PTFE liner for reduced friction, increased routing flexibility and lighter weight
Patented

Rev3 Kits have cables specifically designed for fitment on specific models, but the Rev3 throttle itself is not model specific. Therefore, in some situations, the Rev3 kit may not be a direct bolt on installation due to space limitations on the stock handlebar. In some installations, it may be necessary to move other control components on the stock handlebar, shorten the Rev3 throttle tube and grip, install longer after market handlebars, or possibly all of the above. It is up to the end user to determine the best method for fitment on their motorcycle, and ensure that the Rev3 kit is installed properly and with the correct clearances for safe operation. Installation should be done by a qualified mechanic and carefully checked for proper function. Warning: Improper installation could result in great bodily injury or death.

Cooling System Tester - Type B
Unique design allows you to test the cooling system on a running engine to check for leaks or excessive pressure when system is hot
Unique radiator adapter will work with most motorcycle, ATV and UTV applications equipped with a 30 mm spout
Use with a common hand pump to pressurize a non-running system (pump not included)
Remote, accurate, easy to read gauge makes readings and diagnosis easy
Tests radiator and radiator cap for leaks and correct pressure release limit
Specified range is most common on European manufactured radiators
Designed to work on radiator necks from 20 mm to 24.5 mm
Pressurizes motorcycle cooling systems to check for leaks
Adapter also available separately.
Holding Tool - Clutch - Heavy-Duty
Reversible blades work on conventional square spline and on round spline style clutch hubs
Extended knurled handle provides sure grip when removing or torquing the clutch hub nut
Can be used to remove the locking ring on UTV fuel cells to remove fuel pumps
Precision machined stainless steel blades are strong and durable
Securely holds clutch hubs on most motorcycles and ATVs
Tool jaws have a range of 2.9" to 4.72"
Aircraft grade billet aluminum body
